basic.description:
{Basic Archery}
Increases 10% range damage and casts Precision at battle opening for 10 rounds

advanced.description:
{Advanced Archery}
Increases 25% range damage and casts Precision at battle opening for 20 rounds

expert.description:
{Expert Archery}
Increases 50% range damage and casts Precision at battle opening for 40 rounds
